author: Testpress
description: Zenvidya is an EdTech platform founded in October 2024 by Arvind Chauhan (IIT Kanpur alumnus) to provide specialized Physics coaching for JEE and NEET aspirants. The platform follows a “Zen” approach to learning, focusing on conceptual clarity, structured understanding, and a balanced use of technology to support consistent academic progress. It offers structured courses, concept-based lessons, practice tests, performance tracking, and access to study materials and recorded sessions. Zenvidya is designed to help students build strong fundamentals and maintain a disciplined approach to exam preparation.
